meta.title: 9 Best Military Bases in the U S
meta.description:
If you’re getting ready to pick your “dream list” for your very first duty station, you may be a little unsure of what locations to choose for your top choices. We've rounded up the best military bases. This list is subjective, of course — there are too many duty stations to go over — so do your research before submitting your wishlist.

0:00 Introduction
0:35 Naval Base Kitsap
1:46 Fort Carson
2:25 Marine Corps Air Station Beaufort
4:04 Naval Air Station Joint Reserve Base New Orleans
4:43 Naval Air Station Pensacola
5:49 Naval Air Station Key West
6:48 Marine Corps Base Hawaii
7:35 U.S. Southern Command (SOUTHCOM)
8:41 Fort Greely
